meaning: n.饲料,饲料中的营养成分
examples: The ban will cover food, edible agricultural products and feedstuff.
Red globose alga is actually a kind of green alga, which can be used as feedstuff.
Single cell protein feedstuff production from food industry wastes with fermentation technology.
If the research had been permitted, he said, it would have been discovered sooner that farmers were flouting the ban on feedstuff derived from cattle carcasses.
